horoscope: Getting others to go along with your plans can be difficult in spots today, dear Aries. The Moon moves out of your sign and into your resources sector today, and you're seeking out a stronger sense of continuity and security for a couple of days. You are in a more practical frame of mind, yet also quite innovative, able to bring new energy to the material world. Emotions are settling today. Although they're still exciting, your emotions are steady enough to let you relax and enjoy the moment as the day advances. Earthy, grounding, and comforting activities are most helpful now, and happen to be what you're most drawn to at the moment.

The Moon continues in your privacy sector today, dear Taurus, signaling a time for more rest and attention to personal or private matters. You can be quite fine on your own and content to withdraw into yourself to center yourself or digest recent events and reactions. However, the Moon enters your sign, bringing emotions to the surface and some feeling of emotional urgency along with them! You might seek validation, an outlet for your feelings, or simply a stronger connection with someone or something. Watch for impatience, especially if it's driving your decisions and behaviors, but do acknowledge feelings you’ve buried.

Taking a more relaxed and creative approach to your life right now can do wonders for you, dear Gemini. The Moon spends time in your friendship sector and then heads into your privacy sector today. Both transits suggest a need to pull yourself away from competitive energies, though this may not always be straightforward right now. You can begin the day with a stronger need for people, but end it with a desire for some space. You may be able to see where you need to heal from recent changes or disturbances. Even if you're not completely certain what you want, you're in great shape for getting things done, particularly in a quiet or behind-the-scenes way.

While your responsibilities are strongly on your mind as you begin the day, dear Cancer, you are more able to let your guard down and enjoy yourself as it progresses. You begin to seek out non-competitive, accepting people and situations. Still, early today, you could feel a bit put upon by others or torn between different drives. Your idealistic side is alive and well, however, and it makes sense to feed your desire to dream, imagine, and plan. It's a good time for improving relationships with others and with yourself in the process.

The day can begin with a strong desire to get out and about and to get things done, dear Leo, or to feel free enough to explore and discover. While you may feel a little bogged down by responsibilities, which can limit exploration, try to set aside time for something different and refreshing at other points in the day. Later today, more industrious, practical efforts bring rewards. The need for some structure in your life, or to reassess goals, can figure strongly now. Listen carefully to what your intuition is saying to you, but wait for clarity, which can come after you sleep on it, so to speak.

This should be a good day for strategy and analysis, dear Virgo, although there could be some issues with overdoing this in spots. The Moon swings into your adventure sector today, however, lighting your mood and stirring a restless desire to move forward, discover new things, and break the routine. This Moon transit harmonizes with your sign, which can make it easier to channel your emotions in effective ways. Obstacles may seem to fall away, or you find quick and easy ways around them. However, misunderstandings may be a distracting part of your day. Gestures may not be taken as you intend.

Today's energies can be quite beautiful for opportunities and healing efforts, dear Libra. While you may not always agree with others right now, you’re likely to learn a lot from your interactions. There can be new, exciting, or unusual experiences in your romantic life or leisure activities. As the day advances, there can be a strong urge to uncover a truth, no matter how uncomfortable it may be. Alternatively, you could feel this energy through an important person in your life. Of course, care should generally be taken with sensitive topics, but sometimes it actually does us some good. It’s about putting something behind you.  You could find that you're zeroing in on the more hidden elements of life, looking for motives and deeper meaning. If you're feeling a little insecure or have unresolved issues to deal with, you could find that your mind turns to matters revolving around old hurts, inequalities, and unfair scenarios.

You're seeking a feeling of liberation and freedom to be yourself, dear Scorpio, but today's energies may involve some divided attention or disagreement on plans. Fortunately, you’re likely to discover some especially inventive or positive ideas and attitudes through your interactions. Small changes occurring now in your personal life can contribute to a sense of greater freedom. The Moon moves into your opposing sign for a stay of over two days, putting you in a position to gain a different perspective on your life. This helps you find more ways to balance and harmonize.

Ideas are inventive today, dear Sagittarius, although it's not yet an ideal time to lock something down or attend to the details. Mechanical and mental work can thrive, and communications tend to be powerful. Although you may not agree with others on several points, you’re certainly finding things to stimulate your mind. Unique and original concepts are in focus. The Moon heads into your solar sixth house, and while you may not care for the monotony of the routine, you are more inclined to pay attention to solving problems, which can be satisfying. Avoid pushing yourself too hard, but do enjoy the extra boost of motivation to get your life organized.

Opportunities to advance your personal goals are building, dear Capricorn. While there may be minor ups and downs due to disagreements, you are particularly inventive and original when it comes to business, work, and health. You can be quite motivated to get up to date and modern, and you could discover a unique way to accentuate your talents. Still, aim to set aside time to care for your emotional life and inner world, even in the face of the pressures and demands of the outside world. The Moon moves into harmony with your sign, helping you go with the flow rather than fight the waves.

Today can stir up a strong desire to innovate, dear Aquarius. Networking, connecting, and seeing significant patterns in your life that contribute to happiness and satisfaction can be in focus. You could find it difficult to juggle your interests and responsibilities without feeling a little overwhelmed or perhaps a little guilty in spots today. However, you can feel quite inspired to do something new or different. Certainly, inertia can overcome you if others are not very thrilled with your plans or you encounter delays or resistance. If so, a bit of a break from routine or some extra rest can do wonders for you. The Moon moves into your home and family sector for a stay of a couple of days, and this move ignites a desire for more comfort, rest, and familiarity as the day advances.

You are thinking about your money or resources more than usual today, dear Pisces, and perhaps a bit troubled on this level, or you could find that you disagree with others about money or fundamental values. Even so, this is a good time to learn from one another’s differences. In fact, it's a time when you can feel quite inspired to think inventively. There could be unusual, pleasant circumstances surrounding your relationships or connections. Still, you can do a lot of good for yourself by considering how relationship matters and emotional issues that you've left unresolved may be affecting you in the present. With the Moon's move into your solar third house, you are especially alert and insatiably curious about what's happening around you.
